{{CargoOrgan
|name=Cat Sage's Tailbone
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10858
|idx=63
|description=After the Cat Sage ascended, its flesh decayed into bone. The remains were madly fought over and mostly boiled into broth—only this single tailbone survived by sheer luck.
|skill=
|hp=1764
|def=106
|atk=121
|rush=228
|gene1=Per purple or higher organ implanted, {race} DEF +3
Purple or higher Organs implanted: 40/40
|gene2=Per Divine Dragon Descent, {race} HP +60
Divine Dragon Descents: 20/20
|gene3=Ignore Water RES +60
|gene4=When in Dragon Form:
> Gain +4% Dragon Chests in explorations
|gene7=When in Dragon Form:
> Gain +4% Dragon Chests in explorations (Awakened)
|}}
